title: [IV/MTS] DKZ Industries
description: Immersive Vehicles content pack, Trin and UNU compatible. Adds Vehicles, Weapons, Decor and more
body:
Welcome To DKZ Industries

A Chapter of Expansion

As of these past few updates, there is new content featured that will not be present without other content packs being used alongside DKZ. This is the result of DKZ Industries having a built-in skin-pack! Featuring content added to AuWeSchVEB, General's General Vehicles, Potato Vehicle Industries, IAV Parts, Trin, UNU and more, we expand into a broad range of content, both inside and outside of DKZ Industries! In addition, DKZ Industries has released a secondary project, Darkez International Railways, a skinpack for IR that adds Darkez Industries related content to IR content packs. Currently it only includes a set of skins for the UNU Aerotrain

A Bit of History, and Paying Respects

So, as most veteran pack authors know, and some of the followers of AdamRK's Heavy Industrial Pack know... Adam was the first person I ever worked with for MTS/IV. He has a negative reputation among other pack authors, however he is someone that i feel deserves positive recognition. As one of the only people he's trusted access to work on his content, Don_Bruce has allowed me to continue to maintain the content AdamRK had released. This is an honor that I will uphold. Adam R.K, I hope that you are experiencing peace, where ever you may be. Your work will not be left behind, and I hope to make you proud. May you live on. The purpose of this little message, is to pay my respects to Adam, although our time of knowing each other was short, I wish him peace and freedom. It is also to let you all know, that the Adam R K Heavy Industrial Pack will be joining the next official release of DKZ Industries Automotive Branch. There are multiple new features coming out with this release, which i will let the changelog reveal.

FINALLY! The time for an update release is here!

After so long of waiting, DKZ Industries is proud to announce, that the UPDATE IS HERE! Please be aware, not everything has been remodeled, but everything has been changed, one way or another! Also be aware that this marks the OFFICIAL Partnership with Dr. Professor Luigi's UNU Parts Pack! But keep in mind, this does not prevent you from using Conventional Standard Parts from other packs, it merely means that there are parts in UNU that are required by certain vehicles, and therefore is requested on the loading screen.

DKZ Industries: Automotive Branch Announcement

DKZ Automotive Industries is now identified as DKZ Industries: Automotive Branch! This is due to receiving licenses to begin Military Vehicle Manufacturing, and is a big step into future military contracts. Beginning in 2021, DKZ Industries Automotive Branch will release new Military-Grade Vehicles and Armaments, announcing the M550 Snowlion, Modular Half-Track; P40 Firestorm, 7.5cm Anti-Tank Cannon; M134 Vulcan, 7.62 x 51 Rotary-Barrel Machine Gun; 308 Hive, Light Machine Gun; and 308 Swarm, Mounted Light Machine Gun. Additionally, DKZ Industries has now begun manufacturing in Aviation, releasing details of military aviation Project Rage, and minimal details of military aviation Project Phoenix.

DKZ Industries is hitting the civilian market with the All New branch of Automotive Vehicles!

DKZ Industries, was founded in 2017 By Laura M. Darkez, is the largest, most diverse manufacturing company in the United Chunks of Minecraftia. With products ranging from tools, weaponry, decorations, toys, accessories, apparel and more.But now, in 2020, DKZ Industries has announced a new addition to their manufacturing roster! We are proud to announce the grand opening of the brand new DKZ Automotive Industries! Following the grand opening, DKZ Industries will be releasing the first 30 copies of the DKZ Model 600 Classilica, classic boattail roadster, and the DKZ Model 800 H-Series Fortina, classic heavy-duty pickup truck! Cruise down the streets in style with the new Classilica, a sleek, classic roadster with boattail design, or haul heavy loads with the new Fortina, classic heavy-duty pickup truck!

This pack requires MTS and an UNU, but will accept parts from UNU/Trin Convention-compliant Parts packs

Planned Vehicles: Cars: 5+ Trucks: 5+ Semi Trucks: 2+ Semi Trailers: 3+ Speedsters: 3+ Motorcycles: 2+ Miscellaneous: Undecided This list is not concrete, more content may be included

Don't forget to check out the other areas of DKZ Industries!

Railway Division: Enter Here Clothing Division: Enter Here
